title: The Atomic Unit of AI
description: To master AI costs, you must first master the unit of measurement. Shift your mental model from 'words' to 'tokens'.

lessons.title: The Anatomy of a Token
lessons.description: Understanding the three identities of a token.
lessons.content: To truly master AI automation, you have to look past the text on the screen. A token isn't just a piece of text—it exists in three distinct states simultaneously.

lessons.title: How Tokenizers Actually Work (BPE)
lessons.content: To understand Byte-Pair Encoding (BPE), you have to stop thinking like a linguist and start thinking like a data compressor.
